summary: Completed testing of delete functionality fix for Winner's Consulting. All 10 backend tests passed confirming DELETE endpoints now use delete_one() for actual deletion (not soft delete). Frontend verified to have delete buttons (Trash2 icons) in all required sections: Offers, Universities, Housing, Users, and Scholarships.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend DELETE /api/admin/offers/{id} uses delete_one() at line 750 - actual deletion verified
Backend DELETE /api/admin/universities/{id} uses delete_one() at line 774 - actual deletion verified
Backend DELETE /api/admin/housing/{id} uses delete_one() at line 798 - actual deletion verified
Backend DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} uses delete_one() at line 725 with self-delete protection at lines 723-724
Frontend AdminCMS.jsx has deleteUser function at lines 255-264 with confirmation dialog
Frontend AdminCMS.jsx has deleteOffer function at lines 300-308 used for both offers and scholarships
Frontend AdminCMS.jsx has deleteUniversity function at lines 312-320
Frontend AdminCMS.jsx housing delete is inline at lines 1011-1014
All delete buttons use Trash2 icon with red color styling for clear visual indication
seed_data_creation: Test items created during pytest (offers, universities, housing, users) were deleted as part of the test flow to verify actual deletion
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delete functionality is fully working. Backend uses delete_one() MongoDB method for actual permanent deletion. Frontend has Trash2 delete buttons visible in all admin sections: Offers (28 buttons), Universities (6 buttons), Housing (5 buttons), Users (5 buttons with data-testid attributes), and Scholarships (uses same deleteOffer function). Self-delete protection works - admin cannot delete themselves (returns 400).

backend_apis.DELETE /api/admin/offers/{id}: PASS - Uses delete_one(), returns 404 after deletion
backend_apis.DELETE /api/admin/universities/{id}: PASS - Uses delete_one(), returns 404 after deletion
backend_apis.DELETE /api/admin/housing/{id}: PASS - Uses delete_one(), item removed from list
backend_apis.DELETE /api/admin/users/{id}: PASS - Uses delete_one(), user cannot login after deletion
backend_apis.DELETE nonexistent items: PASS - Returns 404 for all entity types
backend_apis.DELETE scholarship (offer with hasSchola: PASS - Same endpoint as regular offers

frontend_ui.Offers_section_delete_buttons: PASS - 28 Trash2 delete buttons visible in table
frontend_ui.Universities_section_delete_buttons: PASS - Delete buttons on each university card
frontend_ui.Housing_section_delete_buttons: PASS - Delete buttons on each housing card
frontend_ui.Users_section_delete_buttons: PASS - 5 delete buttons with data-testid='delete-user-{id}' attributes
frontend_ui.Scholarships_section_delete_buttons: PASS - Uses same deleteOffer function, buttons visible

key_verification_points.actual_deletion_not_soft_delete: VERIFIED - Items return 404 after deletion, not just isActive=false
key_verification_points.delete_button_visibility: VERIFIED - Trash2 icons visible in all required sections
key_verification_points.self_delete_protection: VERIFIED - Returns 400 with message 'Vous ne pouvez pas supprimer votre propre compte'
key_verification_points.data_testid_on_user_delete: VERIFIED - data-testid='delete-user-{id}' present on user delete buttons
